query:
-- Get all distinct service-pack product names to spot bundles
SELECT 
  productName,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(amountExGst) as avgCost
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swli.uploadId = swu.id
WHERE swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND productType = 'service-pack'
GROUP BY productName
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Get all distinct service-pack product names to spot bundles
SELECT 
  productName,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  AVG(amountExGst) as avgCost
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items swli
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads swu ON swli.uploadId = swu.id
WHERE swu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
AND productType = 'service-pack'
GROUP BY productName
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 50;
